q: Why is our churn so high despite high CRM activity?
diagnostic: High CRM activity means your team is busy. It does not mean they are effective. The best marketing thinkers distinguish between 'noise' and 'signal' — your CRM is full of noise. A boardroom synthesis reveals the signal beneath.
answer: High CRM activity means your team is busy. It does not mean they are effective. The best marketing thinkers distinguish between 'noise' and 'signal' — your CRM is full of noise. A boardroom synthesis reveals the signal beneath.
description: Synthesis deficit — millions invested in software, but the CEO is still guessing. Systems record the 'what' but nobody synthesizes the 'so what.'
symptom: Five dashboards open, none telling the truth. MES says 90% efficiency but revenue is flat. CRM shows growth but churn is silent.
